Rein.name: Farm Animal Saddle & Reins
Rein.description: Use on any farm animal to convert them into a mount!
MarnieRein.name: Farm Animal Saddle & Reins Available
MarnieRein.description: Hi @,^First of all, congratulations on your new Stable! Your Horse should have also arrived on the farm this morning, ready to make your daily commute a lot more convenient!^Stable Horses are specifically trained to be ridden with no fuss, and comes with niceties such as a built-in saddle, not needing to be tended to or fed, and ability to go outside in rain and winter, but if you have other farm animals that you want to ride (such as a Barn Horse from, erm, an external animal vendor), you can purchase a set of custom Saddle and Reins from my shop to ride them as well! They should fit any animals, but some are more appropriate for riding and others; it goes without saying you shouldn't put these on your Chickens, haha!^^    -Marnie
